projectDescription: A Claude Code skill that generates professional SVG logos and high-end showcase images using AI-powered design patterns and Gemini image generation.
keyFeatures: Generate 6+ SVG logo variants from product description using proven design patterns
12 professional background styles for high-end showcase presentations
Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana) integration for AI-powered showcase images
Interactive HTML showcase with hover effects and smooth transitions
SVG to PNG conversion with configurable resolution
Support for official Google Gemini API and custom third-party API endpoints
5-phase iterative workflow from concept to final delivery
WebGL dynamic background library for interactive presentations
publicApiSurface: scripts/svg_to_png.py -- SVG to PNG converter CLI
BACKGROUND_STYLES dict (12 style keys: void, frosted, fluid, spotlight, analog_liquid, led_matrix, editorial, iridescent, morning, clinical, ui_container, swiss_flat)
